provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: Reconciliation: code merged in f343624; contract authored, offline gates attested, and the live relaunch smoke captured as a non-secret log artifact. Concur with security + architecture.

resolvedFindings.resolution: Live relaunch verified: local store opened saved_accounts=1 -> restore_sessions restored=1 -> chat shell with no QR (start_qr_login not called during restore). Captured as gui-live-2026-06-03.log.

findings.evidence: On launch the core log shows 'local store opened ... saved_accounts=1', 'restore_sessions: restore complete restored=1', 'ui: restore: 1 account(s) restored', and 'load_history: hydrated ... threads=5 messages=16', with start_qr_login appearing only ~21s later for a manual add-account — proving auto-restore did not fall through to QR. boot + expiry are covered by build/tests (mark_reauth_needed exercised offline; restore loop tolerates per-account failure).

summary: session-restore is honestly done after reconciliation. restore_sessions loads + decrypts saved accounts in-core and re-logins/listens via the shared path, marking failures reauth-needed without disturbing the others; only non-secret profiles cross IPC. The one gap that kept this open — the live GUI relaunch — is now verified by the project owner with a captured non-secret log (saved_accounts=1 -> restored=1 -> no QR). Offline build/lint/tests attested; both required reviewers pass. Pass.
